name: Crest Nicholson Holdings PLC
description: A housebuilder focused on sustainable homes and master-planned communities across southern England, with a recovery plan following operational challenges.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Volume recovery from cyclical trough toward 3,000+ completions. Focused on southern England markets with higher ASPs. Strategic land pipeline conversion.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Margin recovery from very depressed levels. New CEO driving operational turnaround. Build cost efficiencies and improved site productivity. Legacy ground remediation costs declining.
assumptions.risks: Execution risk on turnaround plan, interest rate sensitivity, southern England land prices, planning delays, balance sheet constraints limiting land investment, takeover target risk.
assumptions.catalyst: Volume recovery, margin normalisation, planning reform benefits, potential M&A interest from larger builders.
